issues.title: Progress is stored only on the current device and browser
issues.workaround: Use Backup app data before changing devices, browsers, or site domains.

issues.title: iPhone and iPad installation uses Safari Add to Home Screen
issues.workaround: Open in Safari, then Share → Add to Home Screen.

issues.title: Feedback and diagnostics are downloaded rather than uploaded
issues.workaround: Send the downloaded JSON file through the creator's configured support channel.

issues.title: Public support contact must be configured before production
Accessibility certification still requires five physical reports
issues.workaround: Run ?a11ycert=1 for keyboard, VoiceOver, TalkBack, text scaling, and contrast, then import all reports.

issues.title: Production publisher, support contact, and canonical URL are not configured
Paper Flock 1.0 production approval requires CI evidence from the 1.0 build
issues.workaround: Run the v1.0 workflow, download its quality-evidence artifact, import it, and complete final sign-off.

issues.title: Normal browser tabs may still show browser address and navigation controls
issues.workaround: Install Paper Flock to the Home Screen for the most game-like standalone viewport.

issues.title: Existing saved players are not forced through the new tutorial
issues.workaround: Open More and choose How to play, or add ?tutorial=1 to the game URL.
